Boston Harbor Island Ferry

66 Long Wharf Boston, MA 02110 617-227-4321 Get Directions This is a 50% discount to the Boston Harbor Islands for up to 4 people. Passes are good between May and October. The Butterfly Place

120 Tyngsboro Road Westford, MA 01886 978-392-0955 Get Directions Pass admits 1 person for free. Patrons must bring the physical coupon. Visit museum website for more information. Cohasset Historical Society Learn More

Cohasset Historical Society

106 South Main Street Cohasset, MA 02025 (781) 383-1434 Get Directions Free Lecture Series Pass. Check this pass out from the library and present it upon entrance to the Historical Society's Event. John F. Kennedy Presidential Library and Museum

Columbia Point Boston, MA 02125 617-514-1600 Get Directions Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. Massachusetts State Parks

251 Causeway Street, Suite 900 Boston, MA 02114 617-626-1250 Get Directions Free parking for most State parks including Nantasket Beach. Visit museum website for more information. Museum of Fine Arts Boston Learn More

Museum of Fine Arts Boston

465 Huntington Avenue Boston, MA 02115 617-267-9300 Get Directions Updated 03/26/2026 Use promo code IP-1636144 to receive a discount on MFA tickets. Visit mfa.org/tickets . Museum of Science

1 Science Park Boston, MA 02134 617-723-2500 Get Directions Updated 10/29/25 Reserve pass for a specific day at the library. Download to phone or print pass. Up to 4 people are admitted at a 50% discount off of Exhibit Hall admission prices only with each pass, and children under 3 are always free.

200 High Street Boston, MA 02110 617-542-7696 Get Directions Go Passes are valid for admission only; not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, at special events or programs, on equipment rentals, or in place of any permits or passes. Zoo New England

1 Franklin Park Road Boston, MA 02121 617-541-5466 Get Directions Pass is good for the Franklin Park Zoo in Boston or the Stone Zoo in Stoneham, MA. Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Children 2 years and younger are free. Pass can only be used for daytime admission. They can't
